description: Produce the Mobile Tutor design package (docs 02–08) as a fresh-context, wave-ordered, reviewed swarm. Each story writes ONE markdown design doc under docs/prds/PRD-MOBILE-TUTOR/. Constitution (required reading for every story): 00-INDEX.md, 01-vision-usecases.md, and — once written — 02-architecture.md. Global rules for every agent: conform to locked decisions D1–D5; do NOT re-litigate or unilaterally descope; flag conflicts in an 'Open conflicts' section; markdown + mermaid only, NO code, nothing to build or run.

userStories.title: S02 — Architecture (Wave 0 foundation)
userStories.description: As the architecture author, I want 02-architecture.md defining the three-tier system, academy Content API, data model, Clerk auth and stack, so that every downstream doc has a locked foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates docs/prds/PRD-MOBILE-TUTOR/02-architecture.md
Mermaid three-tier diagram (Factory / Spine / Surfaces) + 2 data-flow diagrams, syntactically valid
Postgres data model as tables: users, mastery_map, progress, content_cache, telemetry
Clerk auth documented: plan-capable, ships FREE through pilot, Sign-in-with-Apple
Academy Content API contract references today's JSON schema (manifest.json, track.json, domain files) as the shared contract
Stack: Expo/React Native recommended with rationale; Capacitor noted as alternative
Explicitly EXCLUDES selector math (S03), factory internals (S04), screen layouts (S05)
Conforms to constitution (00-INDEX, 01) and locked decisions D1–D5; no code; ~220 lines max
userStories.notes: Wave 0. Foundation — locked before the swarm. Read 00-INDEX.md and 01-vision-usecases.md first.

userStories.title: S03 — Mastery engine (Wave 1)
userStories.description: As the engine designer, I want 03-mastery-engine.md defining the mastery model, adaptive selector and readiness gate, so the app knows what to serve and when a user is ready.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates docs/prds/PRD-MOBILE-TUTOR/03-mastery-engine.md
Mastery model: item-level SM-2 rolled up to domain competence with decay
Adaptive selector as plain numbered steps (no code): 4 buckets — due-review, weak-spot, new, stretch — weighted by exam date
Readiness gate defined: all domains >= threshold AND mock >= real pass mark
Worked example included (e.g. '87% ready, weakest D2')
Grounds in existing store.js (SM-2) and readiness.js
Excludes storage (S02) and readiness screen (S05)
Conforms to constitution incl. 02-architecture; no code

userStories.title: S04 — Content factory (Wave 1)
userStories.description: As the factory designer, I want 04-content-factory.md defining the Automatos playbooks, content types, NotebookLM pipeline and verification gate, so content stays fresh and trustworthy.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates docs/prds/PRD-MOBILE-TUTOR/04-content-factory.md
Factory data-flow diagram: playbook -> verification gate -> published -> app (valid mermaid)
Cadence table: nightly feed / weekly podcast / quarterly graded-bank
Content-type catalogue table (flashcards, clips, podcasts, cheat-sheets, multi-explanation, mnemonics, mind-maps, carousels, audio-flashcards, mock variants, news cards)
Verification gate rules: cite-SUPPORTS (entailment) not cite-exists; independent + adversarial validator; source-drift auto-invalidation via KG
Source allowlist: per-track from track.json.verification.sourceOfTruth; security-sensitive, versioned, governed
Draft->published promotion + factory observability/alerting (references the silent-playbook-failure lesson)
Excludes app rendering (S05) and app data model (S02)
Conforms to constitution incl. 02-architecture; no code

userStories.title: S05 — UX flows (Wave 1)
userStories.description: As the UX designer, I want 05-ux-flows.md with a screen inventory and every screen-flow diagram, so the whole app is mapped before any pixels.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates docs/prds/PRD-MOBILE-TUTOR/05-ux-flows.md
Screen inventory listed
Box-and-arrow mermaid flow for every screen: onboarding + path/level select, Feed, Voice Tutor, Podcast, Readiness, Library/cheat-sheets, Settings/frequency, Notifications
One user journey each for personas P1, P2, P3
Every screen mapped to use cases U1–U9
Offline behavior noted per screen; lock-screen widget + answerable notifications; ethical soft-stop
Fidelity = flow diagrams (D4); excludes hi-fi visuals and engine math (S03)
Conforms to constitution incl. 02-architecture; no code

userStories.title: S06 — Risks & compliance (Wave 1)
userStories.description: As the risk owner, I want 06-risks-compliance.md with a risk register, disclaimers, IP/trademark and App-Store notes, so the project ships safely and legally.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates docs/prds/PRD-MOBILE-TUTOR/06-risks-compliance.md
Risk register table: risk / likelihood / impact / mitigation / owner (incl. notification fatigue, auto-content quality, factory reliability, scope creep, token cost, voice latency)
Disclaimer model (three homes) + non-affiliation + IP/trademark
App-Store review gotchas: Sign-in-with-Apple, 'prepares you for' not 'guarantees'
Privacy/GDPR: Clerk, telemetry, age gating; security: allowlist governance, KG/PII
References disclaimer model in 01; excludes gate mechanics (S04, reference only)
Conforms to constitution incl. 02-architecture; no code

userStories.title: S07 — Roadmap (Wave 2)
userStories.description: As the delivery lead, I want 07-roadmap.md sequencing MVP -> v1 -> factory-on with review gates, so we know the order of build.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates docs/prds/PRD-MOBILE-TUTOR/07-roadmap.md
Stage table (MVP -> v1 -> factory-on) with entry/exit criteria
Explicit MVP cut defined
Sequences S02–S06; calls out academy file->DB migration dependency and Expo build path
Reads 01–06; conforms to constitution; no code

userStories.title: S08 — Design red-team (Wave 3)
userStories.description: As the reviewer, I want 08-design-red-team.md critiquing the whole package for consistency and gaps, so we get a go/no-go before build.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates docs/prds/PRD-MOBILE-TUTOR/08-design-red-team.md
Multi-perspective findings table: doc / issue / severity / fix (architect, security, product, UX lenses)
Cross-doc consistency matrix; contradiction + duplication + gap check across 00–07
Explicit go/no-go verdict: 'ready to proceed to Claude Design + build?'
Reads 00–07; no code
